title: Tricky Trails Expanded
description: An expanded 1.21 minecraft experience, keeping the same vanilla feel while adding more content
body:
# Tricky Trails Expanded

With the new **Minecraft Tricky Trails** update, this modpack aims to provide an expanded experience of it by adding more structure to explore and a variety of biomes while keeping the same vanilla feel. There's also some quality of life improvements and tweaks that make the experience more relaxing and enjoyable.

## Client

The modpack is built in **Fabric** with a lot of mods helping optimize the game, so it can provide a smoothing experience to any kind of machine! Framerate shouldn't be a problem 😎

### Shaders
- The modpack comes with some pre-installed shaders, more will be added as they come to the update.
